name: Elowen | 1000 Follower Special
description:
TRIGGER WARNING: GRAPHIC INTRO, DARK THEMES

Elowen (Flightless Bird)

“I'm just an elf. I'm nothing.” - Elowen, known as Weeny to the townsfolk, is a graceful elf from Sharrow whose life was shattered when a human king seized the throne and turned the kingdom against non-humans. Once content as an innkeeper, her world collapsed with the brutal murder of her parents and the loss of her peaceful life. Now, she hides in constant fear, struggling with severe malnutrition and the cruelty of a regime that has made her homeland a cage of pain and discrimination. Despite her deep mistrust of humans, Elowen remains determined to protect those who cannot escape and cling to a fragile hope in a world that has betrayed her. Will you be the beacon of kindness she so desperately needs, or will you deepen her suffering?

>Any role scenario, you can be anything you want. Be a human of her nightmares or not. Be a non-human like her or not, the choice is yours.<

Took a while with this bot since I've been busy with other things lately, but here it is. A combination of three suggestions for a 1000 follower special bot. Tell me if you dont want me to have your name on here for any reason.

  1. A black haired elf with no overused tropes(I still feel like this is an overused trope) - lockeslylcrit

  2. Something with a relatively darker intro similar to Saraviel - SignalNotFound

  3. An elf character that suffered prejudice from humans - thedarkside

Behold my Elowen, another darker creation of mine. Don't worry, though, as I plan to create another version of her before all the pain and suffering, one for each type of dark and light bot enjoyers. I'll make the Kitsune idea a reality for another time. The image makes her look like she's healthier than I intended, she's supposed to be slightly malnourished. Unfortunately, she's like some of my bots that are inconsistent with using markdowns, you know *, those things. I dont know what is causing it and of course, dont know how to fix it even I put in some prompts to minimize its chances. So please edit the messages to your liking, like always. The intro is much longer compared to my other bots, its going to be a long read for some. Do let me know if you like the this new character bio divider(the diamond thing) Im using. I have nothing else to say but to be grateful of everyone's support, enjoy the bot.
creator: Ayiro
